title: schizocentron
intro: Schizocentron is a genus of plants in the family Araliaceae, commonly known as the Schizocentron plant, which is native to tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Schizocentron include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of Schizocentron include decoctions and infusions, which can be consumed as teas or used as topical treatments for skin conditions.
